title: Superficies personalizadas para terrazas de piscinas comerciales y parques acuáticos - Elite Mexico
content:
Commercial Pool Decks & Waterparks
Our specialty flooring solutions for commercial pool decks and indoor/outdoor water parks offer surfaces that are durable, easy to maintain and offer slip resistant properties even when wet. These coatings are made to go over new or existing concrete, and are also resistant to chemicals, staining and saltwater degradation.
Advantages
Chemical, stain and saltwater resistant
Slip resistant even when wet
Aesthetically appealing surfaces
Flooring systems for new or existing construction
Easy to maintain
Exterior solutions withstand year-round weather
Non-porous, antimicrobial and antibacterial
Options for interior and exterior surfaces
Cost effective compared to stamped concrete, pre-cast and placed systems
Increased durability, surface protection and aesthetics for concrete surfaces
Overview
Polymer Modified Cement
Polymer Modified Cement
Pool and waterslide decks
Splash pads
Sidewalks and outdoor public areas
Entryways
Lobbies and indoor public spaces
Restrooms and showers
Polymer Modified Cement
